zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Tyndale於1510年10月6日出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德洛斯賀波利時，她的父親Sir John Tyndall34歲，母親Lady Amphyllis Amphelice Coningsby32歲。她於1525年與Rowland Taylor在英國諾圖波藍德洛斯賀波利結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和10個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Tyndale于1510年10月6日出生在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德洛斯賀波利时，她的父亲Sir John Tyndall34岁，母亲Lady Amphyllis Amphelice Coningsby32岁。她于1525年与Rowland Taylor在英国諾圖波藍德洛斯賀波利结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和10个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Tyndale
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Sussex and Nottinghamshire): variant of   Tindall  . This surname is also established in Jamaica.

variants.name: Tindall
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lincolnshire): habitational name from Tynedale, the valley of the river Tyne, or from a place in Cumbria called Tindale, which is situated on a tributary of the South Tyne. The name derives from a British river name Tina (apparently from a Celtic root meaning ‘to flow’) + Old English dæl or Old Norse dalr ‘valley’.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Tyndale was born on 6 October 1510, in Rothbury, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John Tyndall, was 34 and her mother, Lady Amphyllis Amphelice Coningsby, was 32. She married Rowland Taylor in 1525, in Rothbury, Northumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 10 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Tyndale est née le 6 octobre 1510, à Rothbury, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Tyndall, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Lady Amphyllis Amphelice Coningsby, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Rowland Taylor en 1525, à Rothbury, Northumberland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 10 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Tyndale am 6. Oktober 1510 in Rothbury, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Tyndall 34 und ihre Mutter Lady Amphyllis Amphelice Coningsby 32. Sie hat 1525 in Rothbury, Northumberland, England Rowland Taylor geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 10 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Tyndale è nata il il 6 ottobre 1510 nel Rothbury, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir John Tyndall, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Lady Amphyllis Amphelice Coningsby, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Rowland Taylor nel 1525, nel Rothbury, Northumberland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 10 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Tyndaleが1510年10月6日にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドロスブリーで生まれた時，父Sir John Tyndallは34歳，母Lady Amphyllis Amphelice Coningsbyは32歳であった。1525年にイギリスノースウンバーランドロスブリーでRowland Taylorと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と10人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Tyndale(이)가 1510년 10월 6일 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 로스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Tyndall(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Amphyllis Amphelice Coningsby(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1525년 영국 노르스벌랜드 로스버이에서 Rowland Taylor(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 열 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Tyndale nasceu em 6 de outubro de 1510, em Rothbury, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Tyndall, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Lady Amphyllis Amphelice Coningsby, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Rowland Taylor em 1525, em Rothbury, Northumberland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 10 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Tyndale родилась 6 октября 1510 г. в местности ротбури, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir John Tyndall было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Amphyllis Amphelice Coningsby, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Rowland Taylor в 1525 г. в местности ротбури, нортумбирланд, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 10 дочерей.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Tyndale nació el 6 de octubre de 1510, en Rothbury, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John Tyndall, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Lady Amphyllis Amphelice Coningsby, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Rowland Taylor en 1525, en Rothbury, Northumberland, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 10 hijas.
